title: Formal Report Writing — Executive-Level Documentation
titleTr: Resmi Rapor Yazimi — Ust Duzey Yonetim Dokumantasyonu
description: Master the language of executive-level formal reports, legal memos, and corporate documentation. Learn the precise vocabulary and impersonal constructions that define professional written communication at the highest level — from board reports to crisis response memoranda.
descriptionTr: Ust duzey yonetim resmi raporlari, hukuki notlar ve kurumsal dokumantasyonun dilinde ustala. Kurul raporlarindan kriz mudahale memorandumlarina kadar en yuksek seviyede profesyonel yazili iletisimi tanimlayan kesin kelime bilgisi ve kisisel olmayan yapilari ogren.

vocabulary.example: Pursuant to the board's directive, the logistics department will undergo a full restructuring.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Kurulun direktifi dogrultusunda, lojistik departmani tam bir yeniden yapilandirmaya tabi tutulacaktir.
vocabulary.extra: Pursuant to Section 12.3 of the contract, either party may terminate with 90 days' notice.
vocabulary.extraTr: Sozlesmenin 12.3. Maddesi uyarinca, taraflardan herhangi biri 90 gun bildirimle feshedebilir.

vocabulary.example: In accordance with company policy, all restructuring decisions must be approved by the executive committee.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Sirket politikasina uygun olarak, tum yeniden yapilandirma kararlari yonetim komitesi tarafindan onaylanmalidir.
vocabulary.extra: The audit was conducted in accordance with international accounting standards.
vocabulary.extraTr: Denetim, uluslararasi muhasebe standartlarina uygun olarak yurutulmustur.

vocabulary.example: With reference to your inquiry dated March 15, please find our detailed response below.
vocabulary.exampleTr: 15 Mart tarihli sorusturmaniza atfen, lutfen asagida ayrintili yanıtimizi bulunuz.
vocabulary.extra: With reference to the attached financial statements, net profit increased by 18%.
vocabulary.extraTr: Ekli mali tablolara referansla, net kar %18 artmistir.

vocabulary.example: This memorandum is for the attention of all department heads and senior management.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Bu memorandum tum departman yoneticileri ve ust yonetimin dikkatinedir.
vocabulary.extra: For the attention of the Board of Directors: the quarterly financial review is attached herewith.
vocabulary.extraTr: Yonetim Kurulu'nun dikkatine: ceyreklik mali degerlendirme buraya eklenmistir.

vocabulary.example: On behalf of the executive committee, I am pleased to present the annual performance report.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Yonetim komitesi adina, yillik performans raporunu sunmaktan memnuniyet duyarim.
vocabulary.extra: The legal team is authorized to sign contracts on behalf of the company.
vocabulary.extraTr: Hukuk ekibi sirket adina sozlesme imzalamaya yetkilidir.

vocabulary.example: In the interest of transparency, all financial data will be made available to shareholders.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Seffaflik yararina, tum finansal veriler hissedarlara sunulacaktir.
vocabulary.extra: In the interest of maintaining client trust, the crisis was disclosed immediately.
vocabulary.extraTr: Musteri guvenini koruma ugruna, kriz derhal aciklandi.

vocabulary.example: In light of the recent supply chain disruptions, we recommend diversifying our vendor base.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Son tedarik zinciri aksakliklari isiginda, tedarikci tabanimizi cesitlendirmeyi oneriyoruz.
vocabulary.extra: In light of the audit findings, three corrective actions have been initiated.
vocabulary.extraTr: Denetim bulgulari isiginda, uc duzeltici eylem baslatilmistir.

vocabulary.example: In view of the declining market conditions, the board has approved a cost reduction program.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Gerileyen piyasa kosullari goz onune alinarak, kurul bir maliyet azaltma programi onaylamistir.
vocabulary.extra: In view of the severity of the incident, an independent investigation has been commissioned.
vocabulary.extraTr: Olayin ciddiyeti dikkate alindiginda, bagimsiz bir sorusturma baslatilmistir.

vocabulary.example: The department has been restructured with a view to improving operational efficiency by 40%.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Departman, operasyonel verimliligi %40 artirma amaci ile yeniden yapilandirilmistir.
vocabulary.extra: We are expanding our R&D team with a view to launching three new products next year.
vocabulary.extraTr: Gelecek yil uc yeni urun piyasaya surme amaci ile Ar-Ge ekibimizi genisletiyoruz.

vocabulary.example: All proposed changes are subject to approval by the board of directors.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Tum onerilen degisiklikler yonetim kurulu onayina tabidir.
vocabulary.extra: The contract renewal is subject to satisfactory completion of the current performance review.
vocabulary.extraTr: Sozlesme yenilemesi, mevcut performans degerlendirmesinin tatmin edici sekilde tamamlanmasina baglidir.

vocabulary.example: Phase 2 funding is contingent upon the successful completion of Phase 1 milestones.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Faz 2 finansmani, Faz 1 kilometre taslarinin basariyla tamamlanmasina bagimlidir.
vocabulary.extra: The merger is contingent upon regulatory approval from three different jurisdictions.
vocabulary.extraTr: Birlesme, uc farkli yargi alanindan duzenleyici onayin alinmasina bagimlidir.

vocabulary.example: Notwithstanding the economic downturn, the company achieved record revenue in Q4.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Ekonomik gerilemeye ragmen, sirket 4. ceyrekte rekor gelir elde etti.
vocabulary.extra: Notwithstanding the initial skepticism, the restructuring has proven highly successful.
vocabulary.extraTr: Baslangictaki suphecilığe karsin, yeniden yapilandirma son derece basarili olmustur.

vocabulary.example: All employees will be evaluated fairly, irrespective of their department or seniority.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Tum calisanlar, departman veya kideme bakilmaksizin adil bir sekilde degerlendirilecektir.
vocabulary.extra: The safety protocol applies to all personnel, irrespective of rank or position.
vocabulary.extraTr: Guvenlik protokolu, rutbe veya pozisyona bakilmaksizin tum personele uygulanir.

vocabulary.example: In lieu of a cash bonus this quarter, employees will receive additional paid leave.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Bu ceyrek nakit ikramiye yerine, calisanlara ek ucretli izin verilecektir.
vocabulary.extra: The vendor offered a service credit in lieu of a full refund.
vocabulary.extraTr: Satici, tam geri odeme yerine bir hizmet kredisi teklif etti.

vocabulary.example: As per the agreement signed on January 10, deliveries will commence on February 1.
vocabulary.exampleTr: 10 Ocak'ta imzalanan anlasma uyarinca, teslimatlar 1 Subat'ta baslayacaktir.
vocabulary.extra: As per your request, the revised proposal has been attached to this email.
vocabulary.extraTr: Talebiniz uyarinca, revize edilmis teklif bu e-postaya eklenmistir.

vocabulary.example: The company has hitherto relied on a single logistics provider, which has created significant risk.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Sirket simdiye kadar tek bir lojistik saglayicisina guveniyordu, bu da onemli risk olusturdu.
vocabulary.extra: Hitherto, no formal crisis management protocol existed at the corporate level.
vocabulary.extraTr: Buguneye dek, kurumsal duzeyda resmi bir kriz yonetimi protokolu mevcut degildi.

vocabulary.example: The audit revealed inefficiencies heretofore undetected by internal monitoring systems.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Denetim, dahili izleme sistemleri tarafindan bundan once tespit edilmemis verimsizlikleri ortaya cikardi.
vocabulary.extra: Heretofore, the board had not been informed of the severity of the compliance gaps.
vocabulary.extraTr: Simdiye kadar, kurula uyumluluk eksikliklerinin ciddiyeti hakkinda bilgi verilmemisti.

vocabulary.example: The committee resolved that corrective measures shall be implemented forthwith.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Komite, duzeltici onlemlerin derhal uygulanmasina karar verdi.
vocabulary.extra: All operations in the affected region are to cease forthwith pending investigation.
vocabulary.extraTr: Etkilenen bolgedeki tum operasyonlar sorusturma tamamlanana kadar derhal durdurulacaktir.

vocabulary.example: The report and the recommendations therein have been reviewed by the legal department.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Rapor ve bunun icindeki oneriler hukuk departmani tarafindan incelenmistir.
vocabulary.extra: Please refer to Appendix C and the data therein for a complete breakdown of costs.
vocabulary.extraTr: Lutfen maliyetlerin tam dokumu icin Ek C'ye ve oradaki verilere basvurun.

vocabulary.example: The contract and all amendments thereof shall remain in effect until December 31.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Sozlesme ve buna iliskin tum degisiklikler 31 Aralik'a kadar yururlukte kalacaktir.
vocabulary.extra: The company shall bear the costs thereof, including all applicable taxes.
vocabulary.extraTr: Sirket, tum gecerli vergiler dahil olmak uzere bunun masraflarini karsilayacaktir.

vocabulary.turkish: bu sayede / buna gore / ki bununla
vocabulary.example: We have established a new process whereby all vendor contracts are reviewed quarterly.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Tum tedarikci sozlesmelerinin uc ayda bir gozden gecirildigi yeni bir surec olusturduk.
vocabulary.extra: The agreement includes a clause whereby either party may request mediation.
vocabulary.extraTr: Anlasma, taraflardan herhangi birinin arabuluculuk talep edebilecegi bir madde icerir.

vocabulary.example: This is a scenario wherein immediate executive action is required.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Bu, acil yonetim eylemi gerektiren bir senaryodur.
vocabulary.extra: The document outlines three cases wherein the company may terminate the agreement.
vocabulary.extraTr: Belge, sirketin anlasmayi feshedebilecegi uc durumu ana hatlariyla belirtmektedir.

vocabulary.example: Please find herewith the annual performance report for the fiscal year 2025.
vocabulary.exampleTr: 2025 mali yilina ait yillik performans raporunu ilisikte bulunuz.
vocabulary.extra: I submit herewith my formal resignation, effective 30 days from this date.
vocabulary.extraTr: Bu tarihten itibaren 30 gun gecerli olmak uzere resmi istifami burada sunuyorum.

vocabulary.example: The contract has been duly signed by all authorized representatives.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Sozlesme tum yetkili temsilciler tarafindan usulune uygun olarak imzalanmistir.
vocabulary.extra: Your complaint has been duly noted and will be investigated within five business days.
vocabulary.extraTr: Sikayetiniz gerektigi gibi kayit altina alinmistir ve bes is gunu icinde sorusturulacaktir.

vocabulary.turkish: sirasiyla / her biri icin ayri ayri
vocabulary.example: Revenue grew by 18% and 24% in Q3 and Q4, respectively.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Gelir, 3. ve 4. ceyrekte sirasiyla %18 ve %24 buyudu.
vocabulary.extra: The London and Tokyo offices contributed $4.2M and $3.8M respectively.
vocabulary.extraTr: Londra ve Tokyo ofisleri sirasiyla 4,2 milyon dolar ve 3,8 milyon dolar katki sagladi.

vocabulary.example: We evaluated both the phased approach and the full overhaul — the former carries less risk, but the latter delivers faster results.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Hem asamali yaklasimi hem de tam revizyonu degerlendirdik — birincisi daha az risk tasir, ancak ikincisi daha hizli sonuc verir.
vocabulary.extra: The CEO and CFO presented their views — the former favored expansion, the latter urged caution.
vocabulary.extraTr: CEO ve CFO goruslerini sundular — birincisi genislemeden yana, ikincisi dikkatli olunmasini istedi.

vocabulary.example: The aforementioned risks have been duly addressed in the revised contingency plan.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Yukarida bahsedilen riskler, revize edilmis acil durum planinda gerektigi gibi ele alinmistir.
vocabulary.extra: The aforementioned departments will be consolidated, as outlined in Section 3.2.
vocabulary.extraTr: Adi gecen departmanlar, Bolum 3.2'de belirtildigi uzere birlestirilecektir.

vocabulary.example: The undersigned hereby confirms receipt of the confidential audit report.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Asagida imzasi bulunan, gizli denetim raporunun alindigini burada teyit eder.
vocabulary.extra: We, the undersigned, agree to the terms and conditions set forth in this agreement.
vocabulary.extraTr: Biz, asagida imzasi bulunanlar, bu anlasmada belirtilen hukum ve kosullari kabul ederiz.

vocabulary.example: Enclosed herewith is the comprehensive annual report for your review and approval.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Inceleme ve onayiniz icin kapsamli yillik rapor ilisikte sunulmaktadir.
vocabulary.extra: Enclosed herewith are the revised financial projections and supporting documentation.
vocabulary.extraTr: Revize edilmis mali projeksiyonlar ve destekleyici belgeler ekte gonderilmektedir.

vocabulary.example: Please be advised that the annual board meeting has been rescheduled to April 15.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Yillik yonetim kurulu toplantisinin 15 Nisan'a ertelendigi bilginize sunulur.
vocabulary.extra: Please be advised that all employees must complete the compliance training by month-end.
vocabulary.extraTr: Tum calisanlarin uyumluluk egitimini ay sonuna kadar tamamlamasi gerektigi bilginize sunulur.

grammar.title: Formal Report Structure & Corporate Register
grammar.titleTr: Resmi Rapor Yapisi ve Kurumsal Uslup
grammar.explanation: Executive-level reports follow a rigid structure and use a distinct register characterized by impersonal constructions, passive voice, complex prepositional phrases, and archaic legal terms. Mastering this register is essential for anyone writing board reports, audit findings, crisis memos, or formal corporate correspondence. The language is deliberately precise, authoritative, and neutral — designed to convey objectivity and institutional credibility.
grammar.explanationTr: Ust duzey yonetim raporlari katı bir yapiyi takip eder ve kisisel olmayan yapilar, edilgen cati, karmasik edat öbekleri ve arkaik hukuki terimlerle karakterize edilen ozel bir uslup kullanir. Bu uslubun ustasi olmak, kurul raporlari, denetim bulgulari, kriz notlari veya resmi kurumsal yazismalar yazan herkes icin onemlidir. Dil kasitli olarak kesin, otoriter ve tarafsizdir — nesnellik ve kurumsal guvenilirlik aktarmak icin tasarlanmistir.
table: Report Structure: Executive Summary → Findings → Recommendations → Appendices
Executive Summary: 1-2 paragraphs summarizing key findings and recommendations. Findings: detailed analysis with evidence. Recommendations: specific, actionable steps. Appendices: supporting data.
The executive summary should enable a busy executive to understand the entire report without reading beyond page one.
Write the executive summary LAST — even though it appears first. You need to know the full analysis before summarizing it.
Impersonal Constructions: It is recommended that... / It has been observed that...
It is recommended that the logistics department undergo immediate restructuring. It has been observed that operational costs have risen by 34%.
It should be noted that these findings are preliminary. It is anticipated that Phase 2 will commence in Q3.
Impersonal constructions remove the 'I' and 'we' — making the report feel objective and institutional, not personal.
Formal Prepositional Phrases: pursuant to, in accordance with, in light of, with a view to
Pursuant to the board's resolution, corrective measures shall be implemented forthwith. In light of the findings, three recommendations are proposed.
In accordance with ISO 9001 standards... With a view to reducing costs... In lieu of the original plan...
These phrases are the building blocks of formal reports. Memorize them as fixed chunks — don't try to simplify them.
Legal/Archaic Terms: therein, thereof, whereby, wherein, herewith, forthwith, hitherto
The contract and all amendments thereof shall remain in effect. The report and recommendations therein have been reviewed.
A process whereby all contracts are reviewed quarterly. Enclosed herewith is the annual report.
These words look old-fashioned but are STANDARD in legal and corporate documents. Using them correctly signals authority.
Passive Voice for Objectivity: was conducted, has been approved, will be implemented
The audit was conducted by an independent firm. The restructuring plan has been approved by the board. Corrective measures will be implemented forthwith.
Active: 'We conducted the audit.' Passive: 'The audit was conducted.' Formal reports prefer passive because it focuses on ACTIONS, not actors.
Use passive voice for findings and recommendations. Use active voice sparingly — only when you need to assign clear responsibility.
Hedging in Formal Reports: It would appear that... / Evidence suggests that...
It would appear that the vendor has not complied with contractual obligations. Evidence suggests that the failure originated in the procurement process.
Preliminary findings indicate that... The data appears to support the conclusion that...
Even in formal reports, hedge when findings are not 100% confirmed. This protects the author and the organization legally.
Cross-Referencing: the aforementioned, the former/the latter, respectively, as outlined in
The aforementioned risks have been addressed. Revenue grew by 18% and 24% in Q3 and Q4, respectively. As outlined in Section 3.2...
The former approach carries less risk; the latter delivers faster results.
Cross-referencing makes reports cohesive and professional. It tells the reader 'this connects to what we said earlier.'

tips.en: 'Pursuant to' and 'in accordance with' are near-synonyms, but 'pursuant to' is more legal/formal. Use 'in accordance with' for policies and standards, 'pursuant to' for legal directives and resolutions.
tips.tr: 'Pursuant to' ve 'in accordance with' yakin anlamlidir, ama 'pursuant to' daha hukuki/resmidir. Politikalar ve standartlar icin 'in accordance with', hukuki direktifler ve kararlar icin 'pursuant to' kullanin.

tips.en: 'Therein,' 'thereof,' 'whereby,' 'wherein' — these words replace longer phrases. 'Therein' = in it/in that. 'Thereof' = of it/of that. 'Whereby' = by which. 'Wherein' = in which. They make writing concise and formal.
tips.tr: 'Therein,' 'thereof,' 'whereby,' 'wherein' — bu kelimeler daha uzun ifadelerin yerine gecer. 'Therein' = onun icinde. 'Thereof' = onun. 'Whereby' = bu sayede. 'Wherein' = icinde/ki bunda. Yaziyi oZ ve resmi yaparlar.

tips.en: 'Notwithstanding' can go at the beginning, middle, or end: 'Notwithstanding the delays, we delivered on time.' / 'The delays notwithstanding, we delivered on time.' Both are correct and formal.
tips.tr: 'Notwithstanding' basa, ortaya veya sona gelebilir: 'Gecikmelere ragmen zamaninda teslim ettik.' / 'Gecikmeler ragmen, zamaninda teslim ettik.' Her ikisi de dogru ve resmidir.

tips.en: The 'the former...the latter' structure ONLY works with exactly two items. For three or more, use 'the first...the second...the third' or 'respectively.'
tips.tr: 'The former...the latter' yapisi SADECE tam olarak iki ogeyle calisir. Uc veya daha fazlasi icin 'the first...the second...the third' veya 'respectively' kullanin.

tips.en: 'Please be advised' is the standard opening for formal notifications. It's direct but polite. Follow it with 'that' + a clear statement: 'Please be advised that the deadline has been extended to May 1.'
tips.tr: 'Please be advised' resmi bildirimler icin standart acilis ifadesidir. Dogrudan ama kibardır. 'That' + acik bir ifade ile devam edin: 'Son tarihin 1 Mayis'a uzatildigi bilginize sunulur.'

tips.en: Never mix formal report register with casual language. Don't write: 'Basically, pursuant to the board's decision, we're gonna restructure.' Keep the register consistent throughout the entire document.
tips.tr: Resmi rapor uslubunu gunluk dille karistirmayin. 'Temelde, kurulun karari dogrultusunda, yeniden yapilandircaz' yazmayIn. Uslubü tüm belge boyunca tutarli tutun.

reading.text:
NOVATECH SOLUTIONS — ANNUAL PERFORMANCE REPORT (EXECUTIVE SUMMARY)
For the Attention of the Board of Directors
Prepared on behalf of the Executive Committee

Pursuant to the board's resolution dated January 8, this report presents the annual performance review for the fiscal year 2025. Enclosed herewith are the comprehensive financial statements, operational metrics, and strategic recommendations for the coming fiscal year.

In accordance with our reporting obligations, it should be noted that total revenue for FY2025 reached $47.3 million, representing a 28% increase year-over-year. The European and Asian operations contributed $19.1M and $14.7M respectively, with the former exceeding projections by 12% and the latter achieving targets established at the beginning of the fiscal year.

Notwithstanding the supply chain disruptions experienced in Q2 and Q3, the company maintained profitability throughout the year. This was achieved with a view to preserving long-term shareholder value, even when short-term cost-cutting measures were available. It is recommended that this approach be continued in FY2026.

---

CRISIS RESPONSE MEMORANDUM — CONFIDENTIAL
Subject to restricted distribution — Executive Committee only

Please be advised that on March 22, a critical data breach was detected in our client management system. The undersigned, in coordination with the Chief Information Security Officer, hereby confirms that the breach has been contained forthwith.

In light of the severity of this incident, the following actions have been taken: (1) All affected systems were isolated within 47 minutes of detection. (2) An independent cybersecurity firm has been engaged to conduct a forensic investigation. (3) Pursuant to GDPR Article 33, the relevant data protection authority was notified within the mandatory 72-hour window.

It has been determined that the breach affected approximately 3,200 client records. Hitherto, no evidence of data misuse has been identified; however, the investigation thereof is ongoing. Irrespective of the final findings, all affected clients will be notified duly, as per regulatory requirements. Contingent upon the results of the forensic investigation, additional security measures will be implemented. The aforementioned measures are detailed in Appendix B, whereby each action item is assigned to a responsible department with clear deadlines.
reading.textTr:
NOVATECH SOLUTIONS — YILLIK PERFORMANS RAPORU (YÖNETICI ÖZETI)
Yonetim Kurulu Dikkatine
Yonetim Komitesi Adina Hazirlanmistir

Kurulun 8 Ocak tarihli karari uyarinca, bu rapor 2025 mali yili icin yillik performans degerlendirmesini sunmaktadir. Kapsamli mali tablolar, operasyonel metrikler ve gelecek mali yil icin stratejik oneriler ilisikte sunulmaktadir.

Raporlama yukumluluklerimize uygun olarak, FY2025 toplam gelirinin yillik bazda %28 artisla 47,3 milyon dolara ulastigini belirtmek gerekir. Avrupa ve Asya operasyonlari sirasiyla 19,1 milyon dolar ve 14,7 milyon dolar katki sagladi; birincisi projeksiyonlari %12 asti, ikincisi mali yilin basinda belirlenen hedeflere ulasti.

2. ve 3. ceyrekte yasanan tedarik zinciri aksakliklarina ragmen, sirket yil boyunca karliligini korudu. Bu, kisa vadeli maliyet azaltma onlemleri mevcut olsa bile, uzun vadeli hissedar degerini koruma amaci ile gerceklestirildi. Bu yaklasimaFY2026'da devam edilmesi onerilmektedir.

---

KRIZ MUDAHALE MEMORANDUMU — GIZLI
Kisitli dagitima tabi — Yalnizca Yonetim Komitesi

22 Mart'ta musteri yonetim sistemimizde kritik bir veri ihlali tespit edildigi bilginize sunulur. Asagida imzasi bulunan, Bilgi Guvenligi Sefi ile koordineli olarak, ihlalin derhal kontrol altina alindigini burada teyit eder.

Bu olayin ciddiyeti isiginda, asagidaki aksiyonlar alinmistir: (1) Etkilenen tum sistemler tespitten sonra 47 dakika icinde izole edildi. (2) Adli sorusturma yürütmek uzere bagimsiz bir siber guvenlik firmasi gorevlendirildi. (3) GDPR Madde 33 uyarinca, ilgili veri koruma otoritesi zorunlu 72 saatlik sure icinde bilgilendirildi.

Ihlalin yaklasik 3.200 musteri kaydini etkledigi tespit edilmistir. Simdiye kadar veri kotiye kullanim kaniti belirlenmemistir; ancak buna iliskin sorusturma devam etmektedir. Nihai bulgulardan bagimsiz olarak, etkilenen tum musteriler duzenleyici gerekliliklere gore usulune uygun sekilde bilgilendirilecektir. Adli sorusturma sonuclarina bagli olarak, ek guvenlik onlemleri uygulanacaktir. Yukarida bahsedilen onlemler, her eylem kaleminin net teslim tarihleriyle sorumlu bir departmana atandigi Ek B'de ayrintili olarak belirtilmistir.

questions.question: What was NovaTech's total revenue for FY2025?
questions.questionTr: NovaTech'in FY2025 toplam geliri ne kadardi?

questions.question: Which regional operation exceeded projections by 12%?
How quickly were affected systems isolated after the data breach was detected?
questions.questionTr: Veri ihlali tespit edildikten sonra etkilenen sistemler ne kadar hizli izole edildi?

questions.question: How many client records were affected by the breach?
What regulation required notification to the data protection authority?
questions.questionTr: Veri koruma otoritesine bildirim yapilmasini hangi duzenleme gerektirdi?

dialog.title: Drafting the Report with Legal Counsel and Presenting to the Board
dialog.titleTr: Raporun Hukuk Danismani ile Hazirlanmasi ve Kurula Sunulmasi
dialog.context: Eyup, yillik performans raporunu hukuk danismani Ms. Whitfield ile hazirlıyor ve ardindan krız mudahale memorandumunu yonetim kuruluna sunuyor. Kurumsal resmiyetin en yüksek düzeyi — kesin dil, hukuki terminoloji, stratejik iletisim.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Eyüp, I've reviewed the draft of the annual performance report. Overall, it's solid, but we need to tighten the language in several sections. Board reports require absolute precision.
lines.textTr: Eyup, yillik performans raporunun taslağini inceledim. Genel olarak sagLam, ama birkaç bölümde dili sikılastirmamiz gerekiyor. Kurul raporlari mutlak kesinlik gerektirir.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Understood. I want to make sure the executive summary is airtight. With reference to the financial section, should we use 'revenue increased' or is there a more appropriate register?
lines.textTr: Anladim. Yonetici ozetinin kusursuz oldugundan emin olmak istiyorum. Finansal bolume atfen, 'gelir artti' mi kullanmaliyiz yoksa daha uygun bir uslup mu var?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: In formal reports, we prefer impersonal constructions. Instead of 'We increased revenue,' write 'Total revenue for FY2025 reached $47.3 million, representing a 28% increase year-over-year.' Remove the human agent — let the data speak.
lines.textTr: Resmi raporlarda, kisisel olmayan yapilari tercih ederiz. 'Geliri artirdik' yerine, 'FY2025 toplam geliri yillik bazda %28 artisla 47,3 milyon dolara ulasti' yazin. Insan faktorunu kaldirin — verinin konusmasina izin verin.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: That's much stronger. And for the European and Asian figures — I was planning to present them separately. Would 'respectively' work here?
lines.textTr: Bu cok daha guclu. Ve Avrupa ve Asya rakamlari icin — onlari ayri ayri sunmayi planlıyordum. 'Respectively' burada ise yarar mi?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Absolutely. 'The European and Asian operations contributed $19.1M and $14.7M respectively, with the former exceeding projections and the latter achieving established targets.' That's clean, precise, and exactly the register the board expects.
lines.textTr: Kesinlikle. 'Avrupa ve Asya operasyonlari sirasiyla 19,1 milyon dolar ve 14,7 milyon dolar katki sagladi; birincisi projeksiyonlari asti, ikincisi belirlenen hedeflere ulasti.' Bu temiz, kesin ve tam da kurulun bekledigi uslup.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Now, turning to the crisis response memo — this is the sensitive one. The data breach on March 22 affected approximately 3,200 client records. How do we frame this without causing panic but while maintaining full transparency?
lines.textTr: Simdi, kriz mudahale memorandumuna gecersek — bu hassas olan. 22 Mart'taki veri ihlali yaklasik 3.200 musteri kaydini etkiledi. Bunu panic yaratmadan ama tam seffafligi koruyarak nasil cerceveleyecegiz?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: The key is factual precision and controlled language. Begin with 'Please be advised that on March 22, a critical data breach was detected.' Then immediately state containment: 'The breach has been contained forthwith.' Facts first, then actions taken, then ongoing measures.
lines.textTr: Anahtar, olgusal kesinlik ve kontrollü dildir. '22 Mart'ta kritik bir veri ihlali tespit edildigi bilginize sunulur' ile baslayin. Sonra hemen kontrolü belirtin: 'Ihlal derhal kontrol altina alinmistir.' Once olgular, sonra alinan aksiyonlar, sonra devam eden onlemler.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Pursuant to GDPR Article 33, we notified the data protection authority within the 72-hour window. Should I reference the specific regulation in the memo?
lines.textTr: GDPR Madde 33 uyarinca, veri koruma otoritesini 72 saatlik sure icinde bilgilendirdik. Memorandumda spesifik duzenleameye atifta bulunmali miyim?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Always. In formal corporate documents, citing specific regulations demonstrates compliance and due diligence. Write: 'Pursuant to GDPR Article 33, the relevant data protection authority was notified within the mandatory 72-hour window.' This protects us legally.
lines.textTr: Her zaman. Resmi kurumsal belgelerde, belirli duzenlemelere atifta bulunmak uyumluluk ve gereken ozeni gosterir. 'GDPR Madde 33 uyarinca, ilgili veri koruma otoritesi zorunlu 72 saatlik sure icinde bilgilendirildi' yazin. Bu bizi hukuki olarak korur.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: For the investigation status, I wrote: 'So far, no evidence of data misuse has been found.' Does that work?
lines.textTr: Sorusturma durumu icin, 'Su ana kadar, veri kotüye kullanim kaniti bulunamamistir' yazdim. Bu ise yarar mi?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: The meaning is correct, but the register needs elevation. Replace 'so far' with 'hitherto' and use a more formal construction: 'Hitherto, no evidence of data misuse has been identified; however, the investigation thereof is ongoing.' That maintains the appropriate tone.
lines.textTr: Anlam dogru, ama uslubun yukseltilmesi gerekiyor. 'So far' yerine 'hitherto' koyun ve daha resmi bir yapi kullanin: 'Simdiye kadar, veri kotüye kullanım kaniti belirlenmemistir; ancak buna ilişkin sorusturma devam etmektedir.' Bu uygun tonu korur.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: That's significantly more authoritative. One more question — the additional security measures are in Appendix B. How do I cross-reference them properly?
lines.textTr: Bu onemli olcude daha otoriter. Bir soru daha — ek guvenlik onlemleri Ek B'de. Bunlara nasil dogru sekilde capraz referans verecegim?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Use 'the aforementioned measures are detailed in Appendix B, whereby each action item is assigned to a responsible department with clear deadlines.' The 'whereby' clause connects the appendix to its purpose elegantly.
lines.textTr: 'Yukarida bahsedilen onlemler, her eylem kaleminin net teslim tarihleriyle sorumlu bir departmana atandigi Ek B'de ayrintili olarak belirtilmistir' kullanin. 'Whereby' yan tumcesi eki amacina zarif bir sekilde baglar.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Perfect. I think we're ready for the board presentation. Thank you, Ms. Whitfield — your guidance has been invaluable.
lines.textTr: Mukemmel. Kurul sunumuna hazir oldugumzu dusunuyorum. Tesekkurler Bayan Whitfield — yonlendirmeniz paha bicilmezdi.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Good morning. Eyüp, the board has received both the annual performance report and the crisis response memorandum. Please walk us through the key findings.
lines.textTr: Gunaydin. Eyup, kurul hem yillik performans raporunu hem de kriz mudahale memorandumunu aldi. Lutfen bizi temel bulgular boyunca yonlendir.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Thank you, Chairman Reynolds. On behalf of the executive committee, I am pleased to present the FY2025 annual performance review. In accordance with our reporting obligations, total revenue reached $47.3 million — a 28% year-over-year increase. Notwithstanding the supply chain disruptions in Q2 and Q3, profitability was maintained throughout the fiscal year.
lines.textTr: Tesekkurler, Baskan Reynolds. Yonetim komitesi adina, FY2025 yillik performans degerlendirmesini sunmaktan memnuniyet duyarim. Raporlama yukumluluklerimize uygun olarak, toplam gelir 47,3 milyon dolara ulasti — yillik bazda %28 artis. 2. ve 3. ceyrekteki tedarik zinciri aksakliklarina ragmen, karlılik mali yil boyunca korundu.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Impressive figures. But let's address the elephant in the room — the data breach. How confident are you that it's fully contained?
lines.textTr: Etkileyici rakamlar. Ama odadaki fili ele alalim — veri ihlali. Tamamen kontrol altina alindigina ne kadar emin misiniz?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Please be advised that the breach was detected on March 22 and contained forthwith — within 47 minutes. An independent cybersecurity firm has been engaged to conduct a forensic investigation. Hitherto, no evidence of data misuse has been identified. That said, the investigation thereof is ongoing and we are treating this with the utmost seriousness.
lines.textTr: Ihlalin 22 Mart'ta tespit edildigini ve derhal — 47 dakika icinde — kontrol altina alindigini bilginize sunarim. Adli sorusturma yurutmek uzere bagimsiz bir siber guvenlik firmasi gorevlendirilmistir. Simdiye kadar, veri kotüye kullanim kaniti belirlenmemistir. Bununla birlikte, buna iliskin sorusturma devam etmektedir ve bunu en yuksek ciddiyetle ele aliyoruz.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Were regulatory obligations met? I want to be certain we're not exposed legally.
lines.textTr: Duzenleyici yukumlulukler yerine getirildi mi? Hukuken risk altinda olmadigimizdan emin olmak istiyorum.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Pursuant to GDPR Article 33, the relevant data protection authority was notified within the mandatory 72-hour window. All actions taken have been duly documented. In accordance with our legal counsel's guidance, affected clients will be notified irrespective of the final investigation findings — in the interest of maintaining trust.
lines.textTr: GDPR Madde 33 uyarinca, ilgili veri koruma otoritesi zorunlu 72 saatlik sure icinde bilgilendirilmistir. Alinan tum aksiyonlar usulune uygun sekilde belgelenmistir. Hukuk danismanımizin yonlendirmesine uygun olarak, etkilenen musteriler nihai sorusturma bulgularindan bagimsiz olarak — guveni koruma yararina — bilgilendirilecektir.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: What additional security measures are being implemented? I noticed a reference to Appendix B.
lines.textTr: Hangi ek guvenlik onlemleri uygulanıyor? Ek B'ye bir referans fark ettim.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: The aforementioned measures are detailed in Appendix B, whereby each action item is assigned to a responsible department with clear deadlines. In view of the severity of this incident, we are implementing enhanced encryption, multi-factor authentication for all client-facing systems, and quarterly penetration testing — contingent upon board approval of the supplementary security budget of $1.2 million.
lines.textTr: Yukarida bahsedilen onlemler, her eylem kaleminin net teslim tarihleriyle sorumlu bir departmana atandigi Ek B'de ayrintili olarak belirtilmistir. Bu olayin ciddiyeti goz onune alinarak, gelistirilmis sifreleme, tum musteriyle temas eden sistemler icin cok faktorlu kimlik dogrulama ve uc aylik sizma testi uyguluyoruz — 1,2 milyon dolarlik ek guvenlik butcesinin kurul onayina bagli olarak.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: The $1.2 million — is that in addition to the existing IT budget, or can it be absorbed?
lines.textTr: 1,2 milyon dolar — bu mevcut BT butcesine ek mi, yoksa absorbe edilebilir mi?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: In lieu of reallocating from the existing IT budget — which would compromise other critical projects — we recommend a supplementary allocation. Subject to the board's approval, these funds would be ring-fenced exclusively for cybersecurity enhancements, with a view to achieving full implementation by Q3.
lines.textTr: Mevcut BT butcesinden yeniden tahsis etmek yerine — ki bu diger kritik projeleri tehlikeye atar — ek bir tahsis oneriyoruz. Kurulun onayina tabi olarak, bu fonlar yalnizca siber guvenlik gelistirmeleri icin ayrilacak, 3. ceyrege kadar tam uygulama gerceklestirme amaci ile.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: I support the supplementary budget. In light of recent industry-wide breaches, this is not an area where we can afford to cut corners.
lines.textTr: Ek butceyi destekliyorum. Son sektor genelindeki ihlaller isiginda, bu koselerden kisabilecegimiz bir alan degil.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Agreed. Eyüp, your reports were thorough, well-structured, and demonstrated exactly the level of precision this board expects. The annual report is hereby approved. The supplementary security budget is approved subject to a detailed implementation timeline being submitted within 14 days. Well done.
lines.textTr: Katiliyorum. Eyup, raporlarin kapsamli, iyi yapilandirilmis ve tam olarak bu kurulun bekledigi kesinlik duzeyini gosterdi. Yillik rapor burada onaylanmistir. Ek guvenlik butcesi, 14 gun icinde detayli bir uygulama zaman cizelgesinin sunulmasi sartina bagli olarak onaylanmistir. Aferin.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Thank you, Chairman Reynolds, Board Member Chen. On behalf of the executive committee, we are committed to executing these measures forthwith and will provide progress updates in accordance with the board's reporting schedule.
lines.textTr: Tesekkurler, Baskan Reynolds, Kurul Uyesi Chen. Yonetim komitesi adina, bu onlemleri derhal uygulamaya kararliyiz ve kurulun raporlama takvimine uygun olarak ilerleme guncelemeleri saglayacagiz.

questions.question: What was Ms. Whitfield's main advice for improving Eyüp's writing?
questions.questionTr: Bayan Whitfield'in Eyup'un yazisini gelistirmek icin ana tavsiyesi neydi?
options: Use more adjectives and descriptive language
Replace impersonal constructions with personal ones
Elevate register and use impersonal, formal constructions
Write shorter sentences and simpler vocabulary

questions.question: What formal word did Ms. Whitfield recommend instead of 'so far'?
questions.questionTr: Bayan Whitfield 'so far' yerine hangi resmi kelimeyi onerdi?

questions.question: What was the total supplementary security budget requested?
questions.questionTr: Talep edilen toplam ek guvenlik butcesi ne kadardi?

questions.question: What condition did Chairman Reynolds attach to the security budget approval?
questions.questionTr: Baskan Reynolds guvenlik butcesi onayina hangi kosulu ekledi?
options: A detailed implementation timeline within 14 days
Approval from an external auditor first

questions.question: Why did Eyüp recommend a supplementary allocation instead of reallocating from the existing IT budget?
questions.questionTr: Eyup neden mevcut BT butcesinden yeniden tahsis yerine ek tahsis onerdi?
options: The IT budget had already been spent
Reallocation would compromise other critical projects
The board had already rejected reallocation

fillBlanks.sentence: ___ to the board's directive, the logistics department will undergo restructuring.
In ___ with company policy, all changes must be approved by the executive committee.
Please find ___ the annual performance report for your review.
The committee resolved that corrective measures shall be implemented ___.
___ the economic downturn, the company achieved record revenue.
Revenue grew by 18% and 24% in Q3 and Q4, ___.
The contract and all amendments ___ shall remain in effect until December.
We established a process ___ all contracts are reviewed quarterly.
Phase 2 funding is ___ upon successful completion of Phase 1.
___, no formal crisis protocol existed at the corporate level.
All employees will be evaluated fairly, ___ of their seniority.
In ___ of a cash bonus, employees will receive additional paid leave.
The ___ hereby confirms receipt of the confidential report.
The ___ risks have been addressed in the revised plan.
Please be ___ that the deadline has been extended to May 1.

multipleChoice.question: "___ the board's resolution, corrective measures shall be implemented." Dogru resmi edat obeği?
"Total revenue reached $47.3 million, ___ a 28% increase." Dogru form?
"The European and Asian operations contributed $19.1M and $14.7M ___." Dogru kelime?
Hangisi 'simdiye kadar' anlamina gelen en resmi ifade?
"The breach has been contained ___." (derhal) En resmi secim?
"The contract and all amendments ___ shall remain in effect." Dogru form?
"A process ___ all contracts are reviewed quarterly." Dogru baglac?
"___ the supply chain disruptions, profitability was maintained." Ragmen?
"Phase 2 is ___ upon Phase 1 completion." Kosula bagli?
options: Both A and B are correct

multipleChoice.question: Hangisi resmi bir raporda 'birincisi...ikincisi' yapisi icin kullanilir?
"___ herewith is the annual report." Dogru kelime?
"All affected clients will be notified ___." (usulune uygun) Dogru kelime?
"___ be advised that the meeting has been rescheduled." Resmi bildirim?
"In ___ of maintaining trust, clients will be notified." Yararina?
"The department was restructured with a ___ to improving efficiency." Amaci ile?

sentenceOrder.correct: Pursuant to the board's directive corrective measures shall be implemented
In accordance with company policy all changes must be approved
Notwithstanding the economic downturn the company achieved record revenue
Please be advised that the meeting has been rescheduled
The aforementioned measures are detailed in Appendix B
Phase 2 funding is contingent upon Phase 1 completion
Enclosed herewith is the annual performance report
The breach has been contained forthwith
Revenue grew by 18% and 24% in Q3 and Q4 respectively
Hitherto no evidence of data misuse has been identified

translation.turkish: Kurulun direktifi uyarinca, duzeltici onlemler derhal uygulanacaktir.
translation.english: Pursuant to the board's directive, corrective measures shall be implemented forthwith.
acceptAlso: Pursuant to the board's directive, corrective measures will be implemented immediately

translation.turkish: Sirket politikasina uygun olarak, tum degisiklikler onaylanmalidir.
translation.english: In accordance with company policy, all changes must be approved.
acceptAlso: In accordance with company policy, all changes require approval

translation.turkish: Ekonomik gerilemeye ragmen, sirket rekor gelir elde etti.
translation.english: Notwithstanding the economic downturn, the company achieved record revenue.
acceptAlso: Despite the economic downturn, the company achieved record revenue

translation.english: Enclosed herewith is the annual performance report.
acceptAlso: Please find herewith the annual performance report

translation.turkish: Simdiye kadar, veri kotüye kullanim kaniti belirlenmemistir.
translation.english: Hitherto, no evidence of data misuse has been identified.
acceptAlso: Hitherto, no evidence of data misuse has been found

translation.turkish: Faz 2 finansmani, Faz 1'in basariyla tamamlanmasina baglidir.
translation.english: Phase 2 funding is contingent upon the successful completion of Phase 1.
acceptAlso: Phase 2 funding is subject to the successful completion of Phase 1

translation.turkish: Gelir, 3. ve 4. ceyrekte sirasiyla %18 ve %24 buyudu.
translation.english: Revenue grew by 18% and 24% in Q3 and Q4, respectively.
acceptAlso: Revenue increased by 18% and 24% in Q3 and Q4 respectively

translation.turkish: Nakit ikramiye yerine, calisanlara ek ucretli izin verilecektir.
translation.english: In lieu of a cash bonus, employees will receive additional paid leave.
acceptAlso: Instead of a cash bonus, employees will be given additional paid leave

translation.turkish: Yukarida bahsedilen riskler revize edilmis planda ele alinmistir.
translation.english: The aforementioned risks have been addressed in the revised plan.
acceptAlso: The aforementioned risks have been dealt with in the revised plan

translation.turkish: Yillik toplantinin 15 Nisan'a ertelendigi bilginize sunulur.
translation.english: Please be advised that the annual meeting has been rescheduled to April 15.
acceptAlso: Please be advised that the annual meeting has been moved to April 15
